demo.title: deep-research.sh
demo.code:
# Full memo on a topic
aeon-deep-research topic="L2 sequencer decentralization in 2026"

# Top 5 findings only
aeon-deep-research topic="EigenLayer restaking risks" mode=brief

# Bias toward dissent
aeon-deep-research topic="Polymarket vs Kalshi" mode=contrarian

setup: Configure LLM + search provider keys in the agent runtime
